features: BABY SOFT: Cotton Tree Baby Powder, talc free, protect your baby's skin from friction and moisture. Gently absorbing moisture to help skin feel comfortable. Apply to create a barrier to leave skin feeling delicate, soft and soothed.
DRIES & SOFTENS: Cotton Tree Baby Powder, dries and softens delicate skin. After cleansing your child's bottom, apply a light application.
ABSORB & SOOTHE: Cotton Tree Baby Powder, gently absorbs moisture to help delicate baby skin feel comfortable. Use as required.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Talc Free Baby Powder 280g
description: Product Description Cotton TreeBaby Powder, talc free, protect your baby's skin from friction and moisture. Gently absorbing moisture to help skin feel comfortable, apply to create a barrier to leave delicate skin feeling soft and soothed. After cleansing your child's bottom, apply a light application. Talc Free Baby Powder 280g Ingredients Zea Mays (Corn) Starch, Tricalcium Phosphate, Tocopheryl (Vitamin E) Acetate, Parfum Directions 1. Clean the baby's bottom, 2. Apply a light application of the baby powder after cleansing.
